title: Mace to ULTRAKILL Jackhammer
description: A small resource pack that replaces mace with a Jackhammer from ULTRAKILL
body:
## Tested on Fabric, but should work on OptiFine too.

# A small resource pack that replaces the Mace with an Jackhammer.

![back model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6453fec328fb858151134c1afe64b5df0ff40a0.png)

model and textures by Arty.
